fixes_implemented: CRITICAL: Created NashDPOTrainer subclass that actually uses per-objective Nash bargaining weights in DPO loss
CRITICAL: Fixed FormalNashDPOLoss data plumbing - dataset now carries per_objective_preferences columns
CRITICAL: Fixed disagreement/loss unit mismatch - all quantities now in DPO loss space (ln(2) disagreement)
CRITICAL: NashWeightLoggingCallback properly registered via trainer.add_callback()
CRITICAL: Pipeline now uses train_formal_nash_dpo.py (not legacy train_nash_dpo.py) for Track B
HIGH: Created generate_preference_data.py that produces preference pairs with per-objective signals
HIGH: Rewrote run_all_experiments.sh with proper 5-condition factorial design (Base/SFT/A/B/A+B)
HIGH: Each condition runs with 3 seeds (42, 123, 456) for statistical validity
HIGH: Added ablation baselines (equal-weight DPO, fixed-weight DPO, single-objective DPO)
HIGH: Fixed eval_game_performance.py to accept single model_dir and base model evaluation
MEDIUM: Updated setup.sh to detect pre-installed PyTorch/CUDA on GPU cloud containers
MEDIUM: All benchmark evaluations use construct-valid metrics (StrategyQA, TruthfulQA, MT-Bench)
MEDIUM: Phase markers for checkpoint resume throughout pipeline

round0_issues_status.W1_not_unified: FIXED - factorial design with 5 conditions implemented in pipeline
round0_issues_status.W3_nash_formulation: FIXED - NashDPOTrainer with correct KKT weights in loss space
round0_issues_status.W4_missing_baselines: FIXED - equal/fixed/single baselines in ablation runner
round0_issues_status.W5_scope_too_wide: FIXED - 4 representative games, 3 benchmarks, focused conditions
